entry.title: output purchase order SAP PUBLIC CLOUD
entry.content: How are purchase order prints customized in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud?

entry.title: Re: 175842 Note reversal
entry.content: This method is correct. TCODE "OMJJ" is an IMG setting. You can add tcode 'QA11' to allow Movement Type '349' in Tcode 'OMJJ'.

entry.title: Re: Delete list of delivery adresses
entry.content:
Hi 

I know only to delete delivery address one by one from MEAN Transaction

Search delivery address  select it and go to header you will get address tab and then delete it .

Hope it will help you 

 

Regards

Rashid Khan

entry.title: Re: MIR4 - Add custom fields in vendor data subscreen 651...
entry.content: Sandra I clicked on answer to your question I don't know why I had my comment as an answer . By the way I know that we cannot add fields with SHD0 I was only asking if there is another solution that maybe I didn't notice. Thank you for your help !

entry.title: Re: How to get the Current Date - 1 . as a Report Header...
entry.content: With out Scripting is this possible to achieve?

entry.title: Re: How to perform a deep update with SAP Gateway OData V4 framework?
entry.content: It is possible with HTTP POST and  the re definition of the CREATE_DEEP_ENTITY method to execute a deep update in oData 2.0. I did not try it with oData 4.0.

entry.title: Re: output purchase order SAP PUBLIC CLOUD
entry.content:
Hi 

Please check this blog and SAP note it will help you 

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/s-4hana-cloud-output-management-purchase-order/ba-p/12840660

3008187 - Purchase Order Output Management in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

Take logic here and select print here 

Hope it will help you 

 

Regards

Rashid Khan

entry.title: Re: ABAP dump in background scheduled job
entry.content:
I have the issue, that the sequence is right and the return table is empty. Nevertheless, in INCLUDE LPS_BAPIF01 it raises MESSAGE x030(cnif_pi). Any Ideas? Note 1901102 says on the last bullet point:

  • Commit work is used without a precommit.
    -> If you called the precommit before, please check in BAPI_PS_PRECOMMIT the flag is set in the line:

        call function 'PS_FLAG_SET_GLOBAL_FLAGS'
             exporting
                  i_precommit_ok = 'N'.

    This piece of coding should be called directly before the commit work.

I don't understand that part, as call function 'PS_FLAG_SET_GLOBAL_FLAGS' is already part of BAPI_PS_PRECOMMIT...

entry.title: Re: How to import Test Scripts from the SAP Best Practice content for SAP S/4 HANA Cloud into SAP Cl
entry.content:
Hi Nicolas,
Can you let me know, how I can find the "Best Practice Excel file"?
Thanks.

entry.title: 2H 2024 RCM can't forward as applicant
entry.content:
Since the release, we've noticed in RCM that for any newly created reqs, we cannot forward as applicant, apply to the req (it will post, but if we try to apply we get an error saying it's deleted or no longer available).  If we try to forward an applicant, the req doesn't come up in the search.  However all reqs created prior to the release don't have any issues.

Anyone having the same problems?

entry.title: Re: Mask in CJ20N - "Screen" field
entry.content: In that last screen shot the project definition you entered is one that has a coding mask and you hit Enter?  If so, you should enter a support issue to SAP.

entry.title: Re: How Fetch Highlighted Rows from a SAP Table
entry.content:
Hi,

GuiTableControl organizes the rows in a collection of objects of type GuiTableRow.
See also:
https://help.sap.com/docs/sap_gui_for_windows/b47d018c3b9b45e897faf66a6c0885a8/ce1d9e64355d49568e5def5271aea2db.html
-> Rows

Each row is an object with certain properties. See also:
https://help.sap.com/docs/sap_gui_for_windows/b47d018c3b9b45e897faf66a6c0885a8/5341bac75c8d428eb8460f6c84b13eee.html

And one of the properties is "Selected".

Best regards,
Frank

entry.title: Re: How Fetch Highlighted Rows from a SAP Table
entry.content:
Hi,

GuiTableControl organizes the rows in a collection of objects of type GuiTableRow.
See also:
https://help.sap.com/docs/sap_gui_for_windows/b47d018c3b9b45e897faf66a6c0885a8/ce1d9e64355d49568e5def5271aea2db.html

Each of the rows is an object in this collection and has properties like "Selected". See also: https://help.sap.com/docs/sap_gui_for_windows/b47d018c3b9b45e897faf66a6c0885a8/5341bac75c8d428eb8460f6c84b13eee.html

Best regards,
Frank

entry.title: Re: Connect to azure blob storage using SAS token in SAP...
entry.content:
Hello @harsha_kotni,

You can use ADLS Gen2 as outbound, which has the option to connect via SAS tokens, have implemented this scenario and it worked.

entry.title: Conditions created through migration cockpit with distribution formula empty
entry.content:
Is there a reason why the "Distribution formula" field is not being automatically populated during the migration of Real Estate contracts through the migration cockpit? In customizing, the value "YA" is set as the default, but when contracts are migrated, the field remains empty, causing issues with generating object cash-flow and preventing proper postings to WBS elements, which conflicts with global validation rules.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Conditions created through migration cockpit with dis...
entry.content: Migration cockpit does not support Distribution Formulas for migration object "Real estate contract". The recommended approach is to use Valuation Rules for all objects, including J4 Objects, where Distribution Formulas might otherwise work.

entry.title: Re: AJUSTE SINIEF 13 E 14/24 - Symbolic Return and Symbol...
entry.content:
Dear all,

as I realized that the information about the referenced nota fiscal is coming into VBRK table, I´m just adding an entry in the enhancement, in order to fill up the nota fiscal properly.

entry.title: The Evolving Influence of Procurement in Organisations
entry.content:
A study by Economist Impact, sponsored by SAP, shows procurement teams are breaking down silos to deliver success

In a broad study sponsored by SAP, Economist Impact examines procurement’s growing role, interviewing 2,307 C-suite executives from January to March 2024, spanning multiple countries, regions and industries.

The report finds that external pressures have compelled procurement teams to break down silos and collaborate with other departments to deliver value to organisational goals.

This is not only enhancing cross-functional collaboration but also positioning procurement as a key function in shaping and executing business strategies.

In the past, procurement teams have not been given the same access to strategic decision-making as other departments. They were limited within the scope of the supply chain and forced to make choices based on company policy.

However, this attitude is shifting as procurement executives have more input on long-term company planning.

The report, “Across the Procurement-Verse: Changing Trends in the Procurement Function,” touches on what trends are impacting the growing expectations for procurement.

Gordon Donovan, Global Vice President for Research, Procurement & External Workforce at SAP says: “The research indicates that the trajectory of procurement’s relevance continues.

"The procurement function is increasingly becoming pivotal in shaping and executing business strategies. By breaking down silos and fostering cross-functional collaboration, procurement is not only enhancing operational efficiency but also driving significant value across the organisation.

"However, the opportunity to drive a bigger impact is clear. While the report indicates strong collaboration, with more than 80% of respondents stating that procurement’s insights are essential for their organisational strategies, a gap remains (20%) between value and delivery of these insights. Thus, procurement teams have considerable work to do to ensure that their voice is heard and applied clearly across the business.

“As procurement continues to embrace digital transformation and AI, it is crucial for these teams to align their insights with the needs of various stakeholders. This alignment will further build trust and confidence within the C-suite, ensuring that procurement remains a key player in achieving our long-term organisational goals.”

Interviewees cite lasting effects from the pandemic, inflation rates and other supply chain disruptions as reasons for the increasing reliance on procurement.

Effective collaboration with Chief Operating Officers

With macroeconomic conditions constantly fluctuating, procurement teams are finding themselves reporting to Chief Operating Officers (COOs) rather than Chief Financial Officers (CFOs), reflecting the expanding scope of the procurement team beyond cost reduction to operational risk management.

According to the Economist Impact survey, 75% of respondents agree that procurement collaborates effectively with the rest of the organisation to achieve the company vision, a significant increase from the previous year.

However, with only 18% strongly agreeing, there is still some scope for improvement in procurement collaboration and value creation. “Procurement has often operated in this bubble that was in service of its own goals as opposed to in service of the goals of the wider business,” the report adds.

The survey also suggests that executives in procurement are now increasingly focusing on generating insights that align with the needs of a variety of stakeholders, creating cross-functional collaboration to improve outcomes across the organisation.

AI as a driver for digitalisation

AI is demonstrating it can be used to harness efficiency across the business. Within procurement, AI and generative AI are being used to optimise spend, enhance supplier management, create cost-saving opportunities and allow procurement professionals to focus on value-adding activities.

The Economist Impact data suggests that AI is a significant driver of digital transformation. Accelerating digitalisation is tied as the top procurement priority over the next 12-18 months, with 44% of respondents identifying AI as a crucial technology focus.

Respondents anticipate that AI will bring about significant enhancements in two areas: the automation of procurement processes (48%) and improved guidance and optimisation (45%).

CPOs are witnessing first-hand the direct impacts on business outcomes through increased technology investment. To realise the value of AI, procurement executives must formulate roadmaps for change management, adopt new ways of working and invest in developing new skills for their workforce.

The survey states that 69% of respondents believe a lack of vision and business alignment poses a major change management challenge in procurement transformation.

Inflation’s lasting impact

Cost management for companies remains a high priority on the procurement agenda, especially as high inflation rates become a growing concern for CPOs, with 49% of executives citing monetary uncertainty as their top priority compared to other risks – a 29% jump from 2023. Even while inflation rates have dipped, costs for materials and items remain high.

It is no shock that 71% of the CPO respondents identify macroeconomic risks as one of the primary external factors influencing their organisations’ strategic priorities over the next 12-18 months.

Despite this, it is still difficult to predict when and if the economic turbulence currently being experienced will settle down. Once it does, procurement leaders are expected to divert their attention to risk management, with 40% citing supplier diversification as a priority over the next three to five years.

However, “diversifying from suppliers is not as easy, especially if the supplier is the sole provider of the goods or service, or if they are deeply embedded in the supply chain,” the report says.

Technology can help the team to easily spot alternative sources of materials, ensuring supply chain resilience and minimising the risk of disruptions.

The sustainable buyer

There are also external pressures mounting from internal stakeholders and regulators for companies to act on environmental issues. Procurement teams have placed a much larger emphasis on sustainability.

With 70% of executives saying that legal and regulatory non-compliance is a key external risk, procurement teams have responded accordingly, as 32% of executives list sustainability as a top priority, a 7% increase from 2023. Additionally, the top priority for sustainability among executives is compliance, demonstrating an increased focus on regulatory risks.

This increased attention on environmental, social and governance (ESG) has been successful, as 68% of executives expressed confidence in procurement consistently meeting ESG goals, a 21% increase from last year’s survey.

With long-term sustainability measures in place, procurement teams may serve as a model for regulatory compliance.

Shaping the procurement function of the future

The Economist Impact research shows procurement’s growing value for organisations, with CPOs and the teams they run gaining a seat at the table. But to maintain this position, procurement must address critical areas for improvement, such as spend management and cost control capabilities, where a third of C-suite executives lack confidence in procurement’s abilities.

There are still deeper issues which the survey illustrates, including gaps in procurement’s visibility into stakeholder risks and priorities, limitations in creating accurate spend data, developing clear roadmaps and forging deeper relationships with stakeholders.

Collaboration and improved communication are crucial for building trust and sustaining engagement with procurement’s insights.

Investing in procurement technology, such as SAP Ariba Procurement solutions, can help address priorities and enhance the procurement function. These solutions can span various aspects of procurement and include new integrations and generative AI features to help automate and streamline processes.

Additionally, enhancements to SAP Business Network aim to reduce silos between and within organisations and can result in significant time and cost savings.

entry.title: Re: Premium Hub CoE – DSC SAP TM Archiving TOR Object
entry.content: @Rohit_Mahajan Great information, thanks.

entry.title: Issues when standard app 'Transfer Stock - Cross-Plant' (F1957) extension tried via BAS
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have the standard app called  'Transfer Stock - Cross-Plant' app ID F1957.

I need to create an adaptation project for this app with field modifications and controller extension. Since this is app is having synchronous view, BAS  suggested to create Extension Project. So, I went with that. But in the next step Create Extension screen is not loading and is blank.

When I checked the console, error is present. Because of which, it was not opening it seems.

Kindly suggest what needs to be done for this issue.

 

Regards,

Bhaskar

entry.title: p&l reports
entry.content:
hello all 

is there a report to differentiate between one g/l in p&l statement by cost center 

for example i have salaries with 300000 balance and i want to this gl in p&l two times one as cost and another times as general and administration expenses by cost center and i have 10 cost center 4 were cost and 6 g&a 

is there a report like this in sap

entry.title: Re: How to get the Current Date - 1 . as a Report Header...
entry.content: no at the momemt

entry.title: Re: supplier invoice workflow
entry.content: Dear Jerry

entry.title: Re: Send Notification Approval Request to Users if the Ve...
entry.content:
Hi 

See these thread I will help you, A little Part I have pasted 

You can define sensitive fields in the vendor master data that if changed/created will require approval.

See trans. SPRO activity: Define Sensitive Fields for Dual Control (Vendors)

You can base a workflow process on this or simply allow approvers to enter trans. FK08 directly.

Use also workflow template 20000001 as an example for removing blocks set on vendor.

 

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/workflow-for-vendor-master/qaq-p/7045670

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-members/dual-control-functionality-in-sap/ba-p/13250407

 

Regards

Rashid Khan

entry.title: how to read fields of structures
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

inside a custom report, I need to read some fields that are present in these structures:

 

AFVGD
AFRUD
CAUFVD
VIQMFE
RIWO00
VIQMUR

 

since they are structures, I can't do a Select, are there tables that I can use that are connected to these structures? Or are there Function Modules?


Thank you!

entry.title: Re: SAP RAR articel describes the Revenue process. What a...
entry.content:
RAR is able to recognize costs along with revenue. It uses invoices with cost conditions to take costs into consideration. You need to enable company codes for cost recognition. 

Result Analysis is still used to integrate the cost postings with CO.

You can read more about it here:
Integration with Cost Object Controlling | SAP Help Portal


You can integrate RAR with

entry.title: Re: Can I retrieve BKPF values in SAPLFI_ITEMS?
entry.content:
Check the top include of this function group, there's a “GS_BKPF” structure, but depending on where you call, this data may or may not be relevant.

  • This function module (DETERMINE_DUE_DATE) is called from hundreds of programs in the system, so your display will be inconsistent depending on which screens users are viewing.
  • For ALV FI irem display, check FM ITEM_DERIVE_FIELDS which contains RFPOSXEXT
  • What specific calculation is envisaged?

entry.title: Re: Custom Payroll Localization issues with posting to accounting
entry.content:
This is very simple

If you would like see any SAP standard t.codes 
Go to --> SE93 -- > Then Give --> PC00_M*_CIPE --> Click on F4
Then you will see country specific Posting T.codes 
hope this will help you out..!

entry.title: Ariba Risk - Extending Supplier Screens with 3rd Party API Data
entry.content:

I am looking into creating a scorecard screen within supplier risk in Ariba and whether it is possible using the Arba APIs

- the direction needed in terms of skills i.e. front end and middleware BTP, CPI
- any systems pre requisites 
- how long a piece of work like this might take? 
- If there might be any other ways to import external scoring data to ariba risk for a supplier

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_BW4HANA/107a6e8a38b74ede94c833ca3b7b6f51/31403d2ea007472ea07b694a83475a11.html?locale=en-US

br

Roland

entry.title: Re: Inactive Pricing Condition
entry.content: Standard behaviour, if PN00 is in low level in your pricing prodecure, the PN00 will deactivate the PR00

entry.title: SAC Data Analyzer - hide shortcut link
entry.content:
Hi SAC Experts,

Is it possible to hide the shortcut link creation in the Data Analyzer, feature released on the 2024 Q3.

Data analyzer – create a shortcut link for quick sharing SAP Road Map. 

Current, with the user role definitions, I already limit the Save and the Create New Insight options. The point here is the end user is consuming the Story in embed mode and would like to keep it away from the SAC tenant.

My SAC version is:

2024.15.15 (Client)
2024.15.13 (Server)

Data Analyzer - shortcut link

SAP Analytics Cloud 

Thank you,

Rui

entry.title: Hide the option of creating form from one employee
entry.content:
Dear all,

I am facing a particular issue:

We have one employee group which has been given one role, for all the users with the role of employee. We have four 360 templates in the system which are:

 

  1. 1A - anonymized
  2. 1B - non - anonymized
  3. 2A - anonymized
  4. 2B - non - anonymized


We want to create four groups of employees and we want to give them all the permission to create forms in the 'My Performance' page. The condition is, employee of one group should not be able to create form for the other templates, as this can lead to increase in redundant number of tickets. I am attaching a screenshot where in the 'Create Form' page, all the form templates are available. I want to customize this for different groups of employees.

Also, this needs to be done without creating 4 different permission roles and groups.

Let me know how one can do this.

entry.title: Re: To create a new wage for deduction of HRR which is not considered for housing perk calculation.
entry.content: HRA is India statutory so you can check wage type specification via V_512W_D tables.

entry.title: Handling reverse charge mechanism for SST
entry.content:
Dear Community,

I am seeking clarification on the handling of the reverse charge mechanism within SAP, specifically in the context of the Sales and Services Tax (SST) applicable in Malaysia.

The users have already made postings using the input tax account, and thus we need to transfer the taxes to the expenses account as a corrective measure. It has come to our attention that this can be achieved using the "Post Tax Payables" application. However, it's noted that this application currently only facilitates transfers between two tax accounts or between a tax account and a tax payable account, which may not be tax-relevant. 

Could someone please provide insights on how to effectively manage the reverse charge mechanism in SAP under these circumstances as the manual transfer doesn't looks like a standard approach? Additionally, I am open to making any necessary taxation configurations based on SST compliance. Are there any specific solutions or best practices tailored for SST that we should consider?

Thank you for your support.

Best regards,
Rishav.

entry.title: Re: BW4 Hana and ILM
entry.content: Thanks for the answer. We have activated the data flow from the Conten. Unfortunately, all data in the DTP is filtered out into the R ADSO.

entry.title: Park Supplier Invoice (plan for app deprecation)
entry.content:
Hello!

Does SAP have an available roadmap for apps to be deprecated?

I'm planning to use the app Park Supplier Invoice (instead of new app Create Supplier Invoice), but it has old interface and i'm afraid that SAP will deprecate it in some point.

entry.title: Re: SWITZERLAND LSV+ and BDD for the same company code - different identificators
entry.content:
Dear Diana,

as you correctly mentioned, currently we support only one parameter that combines LSV+ and BDD Ids. The problem is, that we do not have any standard way how to differentiate between different types of direct debits. There is something similar in SEPA mandates, where you can flag a SEPA mandat as "B2B". This will then show up in the field FPAYHX-B2B. But to make use of this logic in this situation would mean to force customers to create SEPA mandates when they do not need them. We had a similar query in the past and in the end the customer solved it in their own format based on different payment methods.

May I ask whether you were able to solve this issue?

Thanks and regards,

Ondrej Zatopek

entry.title: Create a Regression Testing Package in Cloud ALM
entry.content:
Hi, All

I want to create a Regression Testing (RT) package in Cloud ALM. When I go to the "Test Preparation" in Cloud ALM, I need to create my test cases in a project, however this is not what I want.

I want to have am RT package, global, with all my test scripts and then, when I have an specific project, I select from this RT package what I want to test in that package.

Does anyone know if it is possible to do what I want in Cloud ALM? 

If it is not possible, Could you recommend how to do this with Cloud ALM?

Thanks

Manuel

entry.title: Issue in Display of Cost in S_ALR_8103558 report against Statistical WBS.
entry.content:
Issue in Display of Actual Cost in SAP Standard S_ALR_8103558 reports against Statistical WBS elements.

Please refer the following scenarios:

Project Structure in CJ20N:

Project is Statistical Nature:

 

All WBSEs checked with Statistical-

 

 

Actual Cost showing in CN41N report:

 

Actual cost showing against the Project / WBS is INR 100,000.00

Hence the Assigned Value will be 100,000.00 + 280,000.00 = 380,000.00

 

Assigned Value in CJ33 Screen:

 

Assigned value showing correct with reference to earlier calculation and screenshot.

Analysis of Active Availability Control 1:

 

Only one cost element has been shown as “exempted” which is not being used in present scenario.

 

Actual Cost of INR 100,000.00 booked in Value Type 11

Assigned values are also 200,000.00 + 180,000.00 = 380,000.00 (Actual Cost included here)

 

Actual Cost Line Items CJI3 Report:

 

Actual Cost showing 100,000.00 INR.

But when we view the S_ALR_87013558 and similar reports:

Here Actual Cost columns showing Zero value which is not correct.

 

Please note that this issue is coming only for Statistical WBSe only.

When we posted the actual cost using the similar G/L accounts against regular Project WBS which are not statistical, actual values are showing properly in ALR reports.

These reports are very important to identify the available amount for further planning activity in projects but wrong figures often misleading the Project planners.

I have referred multiple Notes from SAP and our all settings looks OK.

Please let me know if anything has been missed here or any note needs to be implemented.

Please help on this matter.

entry.title: SAP CLOUD ALM API: Integration with External Chat System (Alerts to Slack)
entry.content:
Objectives


You want to forward SAP Cloud ALM alerts (Event situation) tasks events to external chat systems like Slack.


Prerequisites


Any chat external system can be connected to SAP Cloud ALM using the provided External API Integration capabilities.


The external tool must:

  • Expose REST APIs to receive messages.
  • Expose an API endpoint accessible from your SAP Cloud ALM BTP sub-account.
  • Support one of the following authentication protocol described in the following documentation.
  • Support a compatible payload for REST operations. The list of supported mapping rules can be found in the help.sap.com.


If the external tools do not match the requirements for a simple integration, an integration can still be achieved by using SAP Integration Suite or a third-party API Integration HUB platform.
 

Procedure Overview

 

  • Configure Slack channel to receive data from SAP Cloud ALM.
  • Configure an SAP BTP destination to enable connectivity to your external system.
  • Configure an SAP Cloud ALM web-hook to enable communication between your external system and your SAP Cloud ALM tenant.
  • Create an SAP Cloud ALM mapping to define the transformation rules to apply to messages exchanges between SAP Cloud ALM and the external system.
  • Add a SAP Cloud ALM subscription to associate the external system with the event types raised by SAP Cloud ALM.
  • Send an alert from SAP Cloud ALM to associate SAP Cloud ALM subscriptions and see the result in the external system.

 

Configure Slack channel to receive data from SAP Cloud ALM

Go to https://api.slack.com/apps and click on  then select “From scratch”.

Enter a name and select your workspace:

Open the permissions:

Copy the oAuth token (will be use in the BTP destination) and add the scopes:

Install the app:

Open the channel details:

Copy the channel ID (will be used in the SAP Cloud ALM subscription):

Add the app to the channel:

Then

Result:

The configuration on Slack side is done.

 

Configure SAP BTP destination


In your SAP BTP Cockpit create a destination to your external Slack system.

The SAP BTP destination enables the connectivity from your SAP BTP tenant to your external system.

Add an additional property: URL.headers.Authorization = Bearer xoxb-3512166….. (Bearer oAuth2_token)


Configure SAP Cloud ALM Web-hook

 


In the SAP Cloud ALM External API Management application, create a web-hook for your destination with the following parameters:

  • External resource type: Chat. 
  • Destination type: Enter Other.


Check the help.sap.portal for more information.


Create a SAP Cloud ALM mapping


The mapping defines the transformation rule to apply before sending the request and after receiving the response from the external system.

You can use the following mapping example and adjust it to your needs.

The mapping content is:

 

 

{
    "_information": {
        "_version": "1",
        "_source": "IEP",
        "_destination": "SLACK",
        "_name": "IEP to SLACK",
        "_comment": "SLACK - Channel #sap-cloud-alm-2-slack"
    },
    "switches": [
        {
            "name": "switchPriority",
            "cases": [
                {
                    "when": "FATAL",
                    "then": "Highest"
                },
                {
                    "when": "ERROR",
                    "then": "High"
                },
                {
                    "when": "WARNING",
                    "then": "Low"
                },
                {
                    "when": "INFO",
                    "then": "Lowest"
                }
            ],
            "default": "Lowest"
        }
    ],
    "structure": {
        "request": {
            "ok": true,
            "username": "SAP_CLOUD_ALM",
            "channel": "#{@USER_VAR(channel)}",
            "blocks": [
                {
                    "type": "section",
                    "text": {
                        "type": "mrkdwn",
                        "text": "*SAP Cloud ALM Event: EVENT-SITUATION.CREATED*"
                    }
                },
                {
                    "type": "section",
                    "text": {
                        "type": "plain_text",
                        "text": "Subject: #{subject}"
                    }
                },
                {
                    "type": "section",
                    "text": {
                        "type": "plain_text",
                        "text": "Description: rating:#{rating} - priority:${SWITCH(switchPriority,rating)} - serviceType:#{serviceType} - serviceId:#{serviceId} - eventType:#{eventType} - eventName:#{eventName}"
                    }
                },
                {
                    "type": "section",
                    "text": {
                        "type": "plain_text",
                        "text": "workNotes: #{workNotes}"
                    }
                }
            ]
        },
        "response": {
            "externalStatus": "New",
            "displayUrl": "https://www.sap.com",
            "externalNumber": "1234",
            "externalId": "0123456789"
        }
    },
    "eventTypeMapping": {
        "_comment": "Specificeventtypemapping",
        "operationMappings": [
            {
                "eventType": "EVENT-SITUATION.CREATED",
                "operation": "POST",
                "responseRoot": ""
            },
            {
                "eventType": "EVENT-SITUATION.CLOSED",
                "operation": "POST",
                "responseRoot": "",
                "structure": {
                    "request": {
                        "ok": true,
                        "username": "SAP_CLOUD_ALM",
                        "channel": "#{@USER_VAR(channel)}",
                        "blocks": [
                            {
                                "type": "section",
                                "text": {
                                    "type": "mrkdwn",
                                    "text": "*SAP Cloud ALM Event: EVENT-SITUATION.CLOSED*"
                                }
                            },
                            {
                                "type": "section",
                                "text": {
                                    "type": "plain_text",
                                    "text": "Subject: #{subject}"
                                }
                            },
                            {
                                "type": "section",
                                "text": {
                                    "type": "plain_text",
                                    "text": "Description: rating:#{rating} - priority:${SWITCH(switchPriority,rating)} - serviceType:#{serviceType} - serviceId:#{serviceId} - eventType:#{eventType} - eventName:#{eventName}"
                                }
                            },
                            {
                                "type": "section",
                                "text": {
                                    "type": "plain_text",
                                    "text": "workNotes: #{workNotes}"
                                }
                            }
                        ]
                    },
                    "response": {
                        "externalStatus": "New",
                        "displayUrl": "https://www.sap.com",
                        "externalNumber": "1234",
                        "externalId": "0123456789"
                    }
                }

            },
            {
                "eventType": "EVENT-SITUATION.UPDATED",
                "operation": "POST",
                "responseRoot": "",
                "structure": {
                    "request": {
                        "ok": true,
                        "username": "SAP_CLOUD_ALM",
                        "channel": "#{@USER_VAR(channel)}",
                        "blocks": [
                            {
                                "type": "section",
                                "text": {
                                    "type": "mrkdwn",
                                    "text": "*SAP Cloud ALM Event: EVENT-SITUATION.UPDATED*"
                                }
                            },
                            {
                                "type": "section",
                                "text": {
                                    "type": "plain_text",
                                    "text": "Subject: #{subject}"
                                }
                            },
                            {
                                "type": "section",
                                "text": {
                                    "type": "plain_text",
                                    "text": "Description: rating:#{rating} - priority:${SWITCH(switchPriority,rating)} - serviceType:#{serviceType} - serviceId:#{serviceId} - eventType:#{eventType} - eventName:#{eventName}"
                                }
                            },
                            {
                                "type": "section",
                                "text": {
                                    "type": "plain_text",
                                    "text": "workNotes: #{workNotes}"
                                }
                            }
                        ]
                    },
                    "response": {
                        "externalStatus": "New",
                        "displayUrl": "https://www.sap.com",
                        "externalNumber": "1234",
                        "externalId": "0123456789"
                    }
                }
            },
            {
                "eventType": "EVENT-SITUATION.PING",
                "operation": "POST",
                "responseRoot": "",
                "structure": {
                    "request": {
                        "ok": true,
                        "username": "SAP_CLOUD_ALM",
                        "channel": "#{@USER_VAR(channel)}",
                        "blocks": [
                            {
                                "type": "section",
                                "text": {
                                    "type": "mrkdwn",
                                    "text": "*SAP Cloud ALM Event: EVENT-SITUATION.PING*"
                                }
                            },
                            {
                                "type": "section",
                                "text": {
                                    "type": "plain_text",
                                    "text": "Subject: #{subject}"
                                }
                            },
                            {
                                "type": "section",
                                "text": {
                                    "type": "plain_text",
                                    "text": "Description: rating:#{rating} - priority:${SWITCH(switchPriority,rating)} - serviceType:#{serviceType} - serviceId:#{serviceId} - eventType:#{eventType} - eventName:#{eventName}"
                                }
                            },
                            {
                                "type": "section",
                                "text": {
                                    "type": "plain_text",
                                    "text": "workNotes: #{workNotes}"
                                }
                            }
                        ]
                    },
                    "response": {
                        "externalStatus": "New",
                        "displayUrl": "https://www.sap.com",
                        "externalNumber": "1234",
                        "externalId": "0123456789"
                    }
                }
            }
        ]
    }
}

 

 

Check the help.sap.portal for more information.

 
Add a SAP Cloud ALM subscription


Create a subscription based on your web-hook and your mapping with the following parameters:

  • Resource type: Event Situation to use this subscription for events raised for resources managed by the monitoring applications.
  • Type: Built-in to apply a transformation payload.

Use the channel id from Slack in the user variable.


Check the help.sap.portal for more information. 

Send an alert from Health Monitoring

Open an alert in Health Monitoring and click on Send Chat Notification:

Select the previously created subscription:

The alert content is sent to the slack channel:

Monitor resources changes events

In the SAP Cloud ALM External API Management application, you can monitor the events exchanged with your external system.

More Information

  • SAP Cloud ALM API Guide



Thanks for reading

entry.title: Re: Configuration for manual Absence Days in IT2001
entry.content: Absence days will calculate based on below step and table Assign Deduction Rules to Counting Rules - T556C (but you need to do some experiment) PF below screenshot FYI

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud: Custom Widget & Widget Add-Ons Samples Preview
entry.content:
Hey Madhu, 

Sorry for the late answer. 

did you tried it with only 1 measure and 1 dimension ? 

Thanks

Marouene

entry.title: Re: 🟣 Boost Development with GenAI in SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hi @Dan_Wroblewski 

It's amazing that there is a cat with a beard, I've seen them with boots, but never with a beard and even less blue haha.

Regarding what is coming with SAP Build Process Automation, I would like to say that for those of us who are not native Developers, the ability to obtain an explanation of an artifact is very valuable.

I usually recycle what other artifacts from other projects already do, this will allow me to take advantage of more artifacts within projects that have already been created and are available in the Store.

Excellent demo by Miguel, it was nice to see Josh as a host, thank you so much for sharing with us the new features that we will soon be able to use in our projects.

Best regards,

Erick

entry.title: how to read field with namespace error Undeclared namespace prefix
entry.content:
hello everyone,

i need to read the content of the "test" field with namespace via content modifier

this is the xml:

 

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<soap:Envelope xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/">
  <soap:Header>
    <wsse:Security soap:mustUnderstand="1" xmlns:wsse="http://docs.oasis-open.org/wss/2004/01/oasis-200401-wss-wssecurity-secext-1.0.xsd"/>
  </soap:Header>
  <soap:Body>
    <n0:invoke xmlns="http://cxf.component.camel.apache.org/">
      <n0:test>string</n0:test>
    </n0:invoke>
  </soap:Body>
</soap:Envelope>

 

I entered the namespace in the "namespace mapping" section

 

 

 

 

 

 

i tried also this:

Content modifier:

 

after a test via Postman, I immediately get the following error:

Undeclared namespace prefix "n0"

 

 

how can i do it?
thank you

entry.title: Re: Avoidance of goods movements for production yield and...
entry.content: You can set the Disable Goods Receipt for the collaboration directive. See https://help.sap.com/docs/sap-digital-manufacturing/execution/manage-collaboration-directives?locale=en-US (Customization section)

entry.title: Re: ECC-S4 migration: Freight tab missing in MIGO_GI for STO
entry.content: Solved after applying this three notes> 3132555 3520962 3431343

entry.title: Re: Identity and Access Management with Microsoft Entra, Part I: Managing access to SAP BTP
entry.content: @MartinRaepple  Hi, is it possible to use SAML between IAS and EntraID and OIDC between IAS and BTP?

entry.title: I would like to query success factors about training completion for a course for a user via API call
entry.content:
My request is to connect Query the completion of a course by a user from GRC via API before provisioning access for that user.  A simple Boolean response to the query is all that I need.  How can I accomplish this?

Ideally the query will contain a userid and course number/name and i would get back a yes or no.

entry.title: Re: 2408 release- C4C screen to open when triggered from...
entry.content: Thank you Rathika. Its really helpful.

entry.title: Re: 999 – The Number of the BSEG
entry.content:
Hello Stefan,

Thank you for your feedback. In the meantime, we have made some progress on the topic. What happened was the following:

  • We did indeed maintain “Independent Summarization of Entry View (BSEG)" for the AWTYP 'FKKSU' for fiel PAOBJNR.
  • We maintained as well “Independent Summarization of General Ledger View and Profitablity Segments” for the AWTYP 'FKKSU' for the CO-PA characteristics.
  • As you said: BSEG summarization is also a precondition for ACDOCA summarization
  • We had another filed in BSEG (XREF1 --> source FI-CA) that interfered with the summarization because this field was unique for each line item in BSEG and therefore made the summarization impossible.
  • What’s strange is that we did not face the limitations you mentioned for FI-CA: “these are never BSEG summarized, regardless of any OBCY customizing! » But however, we did not use the BADI implementation. We only used the “second line of defense”.

The correction we did was the following:

  • “Independent Summarization of Entry View (BSEG)" for the AWTYP 'FKKSU'. For the field XREF1 and PAOBJNR
  • “Independent Summarization of General Ledger View and Profitablity Segments” for the AWTYP 'FKKSU' for the CO-PA characteristics

Doing so we where able to go from documents with 1208 line items in ACDOCA and 1190 line items in BSEG to a posting with 187 line items in ACDOCA and 169 line items in BSEG.

Thank's for the help ! Best regards,

Samuel

entry.title: Re: Local consumption of business event in S/4HANA ABAP c...
entry.content: As of now I was able to locally consume business event belonging to sales order however for business partner the event is not C1 released which restricts local consumption. Have you faced similar issue ?

entry.title: SEN companion for the desktop several work areas
entry.content:
Hello,

I have several production teams which operate in different work areas, for example:

  1. SAP
  2. Microsoft
  3. etc

I need to configure desktop companion to use content from several wa.

I understand I have to change lesson.js but I don't know how.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: 🔴 Filtering of RAP business events in SAP BTP ABAP Environment and in AEM
entry.content: No, this is currently not possible, but we are working on updating the filter functionality. The plan is that you will be able to automatically define filter conditions for each field of the corresponding event payload (with some necessary restrictions) in the source system without adding the additional annotation.

entry.title: Service broker failed to delete service binding for instance iflow-key
entry.content:
Hi all,

I am trying to subscribe to delete a service key of Process Integration Runtime in my trial environment. I am getting the below error:

Service broker failed to delete service binding for instance <key-name>: Service broker error: Service broker it-broker-rt failed with: Internal Server Error
Does anybody have any idea on this?

entry.title: Re: Analytics Path Framework (APF) | Part 4 : Export and Import function of APF Configuration Modele
entry.content:
Hello Sir,

I am new to APF and was able to create a demo APF following the steps mentioned by you. Thank you. I am wondering how the user will be able to execute it, as I can execute directly in the APF module. Can you please let me know where I can see the tile, if one has been created, or how to deploy it and create a tile for the user?

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: MIR4 - Add custom fields in vendor data subscreen 651...
entry.content: First of all, look at SAPLMR1M subscreen 6510, did you see any place for generic content? It takes 30 seconds. I didn't see one. So, the only solution left is a modification of standard.

entry.title: Re: How configure and use external Tax Engine calculation in S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Olá Thiago, 

Para esse teste, vocês estão usando a Tax Procedure Standard entregue nas Best Practices do SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition ? 

Se vocês criaram uma Tax Procedure "Z", isso não funciona no S/4HANA CLoud Public.

Além disso, para o Brasil, é necessário criar ordens de Compra (Purchase Order) com a aplicação SAP GUI "Create Purchase Order Advanced". Nesta Fiori app, é necessário no item da Ordem de compra, preencher a Tab "Brazil" com la informação do "Additional Fiscal Data". Sem isso, não é chamado o Tax Engine. 

Fora isso, seria necessário validar as configurações que vocês fizeram. Verifique no aplicativo "External Tax Calculation Trace", o que foi registrado na chamada do Tax Engine. 

Abraços, 

William

entry.title: Re: MIR4 - Add custom fields in vendor data subscreen 651...
entry.content: See my previous comment. The button Answer is not linked to a comment, it's reserved to propose a solution. I agree that the design of this Website is not satisfying. Instead, use Replies > Comment (on the question or on a proposed answer).

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community!

I’m excited to hear about the Digital Skills Initiative, especially as it focuses on providing opportunities for those who may face barriers to entering the tech industry. 

As someone looking to create future career opportunities in a foreign country without knowing the language, I see this program as a fantastic gateway to building skills and expertise within the SAP ecosystem. The flexibility of scheduling the exam within the next 12 months offers a great chance for people like me to set goals and move forward with career advancement.

Thank you to SAP Learning for creating this initiative! I look forward to completing my studies and hope this program will continue to provide a pathway for individuals to achieve their career goals.

Best,
Denitsa Ivanova

entry.title: Integration between SAP Cloud ALM and Dynatrace
entry.content:
Hi,

We are integrating SAP Cloud ALM with Dynatrace so that Dynatrace can read events sent by SAP CALM and display them on a Dynatrace dashboard.

  1. During the creation of the BTP Destination, the following question arises: in the "Authorization" field, which of the available options should we choose to connect the API with Dynatrace, considering we have the Dynatrace API URL and a token generated from Dynatrace?
  2. We would also like to know if there is specific documentation for the integration with Dynatrace, such as documentation, customer success stories, etc.

 

Thanks in advance
Best Regards!


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: CDS Data Model for Analytical List Page
entry.content: Thanks, it seems to work even without the analytical query.

entry.title: Re: Integration between SAP Cloud ALM and Dynatrace
entry.content:
Currently there is no official documentation or resources (e.g. built-in mappings) for connecting Dynatrace to SAP Cloud ALM. Any connection between SAP Cloud ALM and Dynatrace will need to be configured from scratch.

External software can leverage SAP Cloud ALM data using one of our two different API categories from the API Reference guide:

  1. PUSH APIs carry data internally in the SAP Cloud ALM tenant. When an event is triggered in SAP Cloud ALM, the External API Management app sends an API request with a payload directly to the external software (via that software's API).
  2. PULL APIs are exposed by SAP Cloud ALM so that external software can send API requests to SAP Cloud ALM and fetches data from the tenant. 

Each API category (PUSH or PULL) best serves a specific scenario:

  • When a single event must occur in response to a metric threshold being passed and an alert being generated (e.g. sending an MS Teams notification, creating a ticket in external software), the PUSH APIs are the best option. 
  • For the collection of general metric data for dashboards/custom reports, the PULL APIs are the best option.

You described collecting event data for a dashboard in Dynatrace using the "External API Management" app (e.g. PUSH APIs). In my opinion, configuring Dynatrace to use the SAP Cloud ALM PULL APIs is a better fit.

If you choose to proceed using the PUSH APIs, you must choose the "Authentication" method specified by the API of your target software (Dynatrace). You mentioned having a token. In that scenario, it sounds like "OAuth2JWTBearer" might be the right choice, as tokens are typically "bearer" types. For full certainty, refer to the Dynatrace documentation for information about how they classify the Token type, and make a selection based on that information.

entry.title: Re: how to read fields of structures
entry.content: I guess you are talking about screen fields which reference components of the structures you have listed. These screen fields are initialized from tables. Now the question is to know from which screen these fields were taken, and you'll need to display that screen and use a SQL trace to know from which tables they come.

entry.title: Re: Identity and Access Management with Microsoft Entra, Part I: Managing access to SAP BTP
entry.content: @sam_venkat Yes, IAS handles the "protocol translation". Yet for curiosity: Why do you prefer SAML (between IAS and Entra)?

entry.title: Where can Product Manager start learning how to use the Backoffice Product Cockpit?
entry.content:
I recommend to access our Managing Products in the Backoffice Product Cockpit learning journey.


Overview
This learning journey is part of the overall training arc for beginner business users of SAP Commerce Cloud. The present learning journey focuses on the Product Manager role, and explains how Product Managers use the Backoffice Product Cockpit to complete their daily activities. 

Learning objectives
At the end of this course, beginner business users responsible for product management will be able to: 

  • Understand the product data enrichment process.
  • Manage, categorize and classify products.
  • Search for products in Backoffice Product Cockpit and search using filters and/or facets.
  • Bulk create and edit products by using Excel import/export in the Backoffice Product Cockpit.
  • Understand Media Management Framework in SAP Commerce Cloud and the media conversion process.
  • Add and manage media assets, and assign media to products. 
  • Configure basic and multi-dimensional variants.
  • Group products into bundles and assign a special bundle price.

    Pre-requisites

    • Understanding the Purpose of SAP Commerce Cloud, its Components and User Roles


      Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area.

      Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you. 

      I appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

      Kind regards
      Margit

entry.title: Is there any SAP std soln available in order to trigger workflow while Customer Invoice cancellation
entry.content:
Background here is Business want to set a workflow for every customer Invoice cancellation (S1). I have checked that only SAP standard supports here is to trigger workflow for preliminary billing documents and not for Billing documents like S1 or F2.   Is there any one has implemented this with small customization or already any SAP Note is released on this topic?  

SAP Implementation expert please advise me on this topic. Thanks in advance.

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition 

SAP Workflow Management, workflow capability

entry.title: Re: How configure and use external Tax Engine calculation in S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Olá Augusto86, 

No SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public, mesmo que você crie uma pricing "Z" copia da SD procedure Standard, como você fez, não tem todas as configurações necessárias para ativar essa Pricing, da mesma maneira que fazemos no SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition ou no S/4HANA On-Premise. 

Até o Release 2408, isso ainda não é possível. 

Abraços,

William

entry.title: PO account assignment error ME066 with enhanced limits
entry.content:
We have configured a new account assignment category, which is a copy of standard account 
assignment "K" Also we have maintained entries for Enhanced Limits in configuration node 
"Define Combination of Item Categories/Account Assignment Categories" 

But still we are facing the error "Combination item category E/account assignment category * not defined"
while creating Purchase Orders. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: PO account assignment error ME066 with enhanced limits
entry.content:
Only these standard item categories are supported for Enhanced Limit items 

  • C (sales order)
  • K (cost center)
  • P (project)
  • S (third-party project)
  • U (unknown)
  • N (network)
  • A (asset)
  • F (order)

See KBA 3293207 for more details

entry.title: How to display sender name instead of email id in SAP ABAP ?
entry.content:
Hello, 

I am using FM SO_NEW_DOCUMENT_SEND_API1 to send mails to users, however my requirement is to not show sender mail id in mail instead I have to show NoreplySAP is it possible in ABAP programming.

Example Sender mail id is 'sap.abap@gmail.com' it should reflect as 'NoreplySAP' in inbox and SOST.

Can anyone please suggest?

entry.title: Multiple Royalty Recipients in Condition Contract in S4 Public Cloud
entry.content:
A company has a royalty agreement with three co-authors for a book title. These authors have different percentages in the royalty sharing. How best do we manage this in the Condition Contract? If we create three suppliers, then how do you put the condition rates in the condition contract? A condition contract in the public cloud can accept only one Royalty Recipient.

Please advise!

entry.title: Re: SAP RAR articel describes the Revenue process. What a...
entry.content: Great

entry.title: Re: How to change value help dialog table from grid table to responsive table?
entry.content: @EndUserText.label: 'Kundennummer' @ObjectModel.mandatory: true @Consumption.valueHelpDefinition: [{ entity : {name: 'ZI_SALES_ORDER_CUSTOMER', element: 'Customer' }, additionalBinding: [{ localElement: 'zterm', element: 'PaymentTerms', usage:#RESULT } ] }] @ui.defaultValue : 'Bitte Kunde auswählen'

entry.title: Re: Where can I download crystal reports 2020 runtime?
entry.content: Can I get Only Run Time of SAP Crystal Reports 2020? If So where Can I get it? I would like to use Run time and see of the reports developed with old versions still run.

entry.title: Modify the posting in F-54 when making an advance payment to a vendor related to a fixed asset
entry.content: In a process where the supplier requests an advance payment for the purchase of fixed assets, an advance request is made using transaction F-47. Then, when the payment is made through transaction F-53, a posting is made to banks and suppliers, as well as to fixed assets and supplier advances. How can we eliminate these last two postings and only post to banks and suppliers?

entry.title: AdobeForms. Print positions of VL02N in different pages.
entry.content:
Dear dev team,

I am writing to you regarding an issue that I can't seem to resolve, and I hope someone can assist me. I need to rewrite the delivery printout from scratch, and I was instructed that the delivery items must be projected on separate pages.

For example, if there are 3 delivery items, I need to print 3 different pages, each showing the details of one item in the correct fields.

I have attached the current printout for reference.

This is the expected result: the items are projected individually in the dedicated section (green). The rest of the sections contain header data, so there are no issues with that part.

I hope to find some support with this. Thank you so much!,

Gianni

entry.title: Re: Identity and Access Management with Microsoft Entra, Part I: Managing access to SAP BTP
entry.content: @H_Ettelbrueck Thanks. It is not a preference thing but trying to minimize number of changes as we are operating this way for several years now. Is it easy to transition from SAML to OIDC for the setup between Entra and IAS?  Would it mpact the various BTP, SaaS applications that use IAS as a proxy?

entry.title: Re: SAP build Process Automation is not capturing SAP GUI window completely
entry.content: We are facing the same problem with SAP Gui 32 bit SP 9 patch 1

entry.title: Triggering an Error Message leads to Warning Message in RAP BTP
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I'm trying to to display an error message in my Fiori App, but instead a warning message is displayed with the option to continue processing.

Creating the Message 

 

APPEND VALUE #( %tky = run-%tky ) TO failed-run.
APPEND VALUE #( %tky = run-%tky
                %msg = new_message( id       = 'ZM_RUN'
                                    number   = 001
                                    severity = if_abap_behv_message=>severity-error ) TO reported-run.

 

 A Warning is displayed

Does anyone of you, know why this happends and how to solve this issue?

Note: The process is started via a Button "transform Product" on an Object Page in display mode.

Thanks and regards, Sebastian

entry.title: Re: AdobeForms. Print positions of VL02N in different pages.
entry.content: Such a requirement can be handled by setting up the top level subform to be bound to delivery items and set to repeat for each data item.

entry.title: Planning to move to SAP S/4HANA Cloud? The CQC Transformation Assessment will help you succeed
entry.content:
Are you planning a move to SAP S/4HANA Cloud? Excited about the possibilities and eager to make the right decisions early on? Looking to identify areas where your team's knowledge needs to be strengthened? Finding the right tools, services and learning resources from SAP can be time-consuming. This is where the continuous quality check (CQC) for transformation assessment can make a real difference.

“Continuous quality checks” are SAP Enterprise Support services that are available with every cloud subscription.

The CQC Transformation Assessment will evaluate your project team’s understanding of SAP S/4HANA Cloud topics, project challenges, and essential tools. It will help keep your project on track throughout the SAP Activate phases and provide personalized recommendations, including best practices and enablement resources.

 

An Example of Planning CQC Services for an SAP S/4HANA Private Edition Project*

(*Please note that not all available services are included)

 

An Example of Planning CQC Services for an SAP S/4HANA Public Edition Project*

(*Please note that not all available services are included)


Key Benefits:

  • Avoid known and potential pitfalls early in your project phases.
  • Save time and effort by keeping your project team updated on the latest SAP tools and accelerators.
  • Learn from past projects to prevent known and potential pitfalls.
  • Receive personalized SAP best practice recommendations as needed.

🎥Watch our short video for an expert view on why you should avail of this service.

Check out the info sheets for detailed information on when and how to request it, and visit SAP Enterprise Support value maps for further guidance.


Get Started with SAP Enterprise Support Value Maps

Find the right content to accelerate the value of your solution with SAP S/4HANA Cloud value maps from SAP Enterprise Support. Included with every SAP cloud subscription, value maps offer structured, product-level Learning Rooms where you can navigate to curated content, be directed to self-service platforms, engage with fellow customers and SAP experts, and discover continuous quality checks.

Access Value Maps in 3 Easy Steps:   

  1. One-time sign-up for SAP Learning Hub, edition for SAP Enterprise Support, is required (please allow 2 hours process time)
  2. Access value maps 
  3. Navigate to the SAP Enterprise Support value maps for  SAP S/4HANA Cloud. Once in the value maps, we welcome you to collaborate in our forums, ask questions or “Request a Call” to speak with one of our experts for further help. Value maps are easy to navigate but an on-boarding call allows us to tailor the conversation to suit your needs and highlight specific content for you. 

Got a question about the value maps, or our content?
Leverage the “ask questions” feature in the value map or contact us:
sapesvaluemaps@sap.com

entry.title: Re: How configure and use external Tax Engine calculation in S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Geoffrey,

What determine which information will be filled by Tax Engine in the Sales Order or Purchase Order, is the Conditions available in the Pricing/Tax Procedures. The Tax Engine providers, mainly in Brazil, they return the conditions specified in the Standard Pricing procedures (Example : A14X10 for Material or A14X01 for Serices). 

There are internal mapping (unfortunately until the Release 2408, there is no SSCUI do to this mapping), between the Tax conditions returned by the Tax Engine provider and the conditions created in the Pricing Procedure). 

Best Regards,

William

entry.title: Re: Multi-tenantcy - is it possible to create a destinati...
entry.content: thank you ajit, yes what you said make sense I will check into this automator

entry.title: Re: Base taxonomy 2024 for ESEF scenario in SAP DM
entry.content:
Hi @a_migliore 

 

The taxonomy files are now available.

Please check:

2827882 - DM - How to get ESEF taxonomy files

 

Regards,

Marc

entry.title: Re: Identity and Access Management with Microsoft Entra, Part I: Managing access to SAP BTP
entry.content:
@sam_venkat Regarding switching the protocol, please check https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-identity-services/cloud-identity-services/switch-protocols-for-corporate-identity-providers. My personal impression: It's definitely doable, yet it's a very sensitive change as it affects all applications connected to IAS in a fundamental way (=> if broken, it's effectively an outage).

With an existing tenant already integrated with Entra and already used with some applications, I don't see a strong urgency to switch immediately. Just keep in mind every new application increases the hurdle to switch later, but that might be ok. With a new tenant, or no existing integration with Entra yet, I'd rather start immediately with OIDC.

entry.title: Re: Incorporating Custom Events from Lobby into SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Just mentioning that SAP build is not only for creating prototypes: SAP Build is a business application development and automation solution with a comprehensive suite of low-code, pro-code, and generative AI tools. It allows to create fully productive applications, automations and business sites, and also to create sie-by-side extsnsions for an SAP ERP.

And SAP Build fosters Fusion Development, by giving cross-functional teams tools to develop business applications collaboratively.

entry.title: Re: TM: Basic Shippment How to set Execution Status Automatically?
entry.content: Hello @mcaratti. Were you able to solve this question? If so, can you help me with that? I'm exactly where you were last year. Thanks a lot

entry.title: Re: Unexpected OData Service Request with Incorrect Path...
entry.content:
Thanks @MioYasutake    sir for your assistance , This is my manifest.json file please check this                                     

 

 

{
  "_version": "1.65.0",
  "sap.app": {
    "id": "project125",
    "type": "application",
    "i18n": "i18n/i18n.properties",
    "applicationVersion": {
      "version": "0.0.1"
    },
    "title": "{{appTitle}}",
    "description": "{{appDescription}}",
    "resources": "resources.json",
    "sourceTemplate": {
      "id": "@sap/generator-fiori:basic",
      "version": "1.15.1",
      "toolsId": "da6fdef7-8e68-489d-93fa-0fdbc31844e8"
    },
    "dataSources": {
      "mainService": {
        "uri": "/odata/v4/library/",
        "type": "OData",
        "settings": {
          "annotations": [],
          "odataVersion": "4.0"
        }
      }
    }
  },
  "sap.ui": {
    "technology": "UI5",
    "icons": {
      "icon": "",
      "favIcon": "",
      "phone": "",
      "phone@2": "",
      "tablet": "",
      "tablet@2": ""
    },
    "deviceTypes": {
      "desktop": true,
      "tablet": true,
      "phone": true
    }
  },
  "sap.ui5": {
    "flexEnabled": true,
    "dependencies": {
      "minUI5Version": "1.129.2",
      "libs": {
        "sap.m": {},
        "sap.ui.core": {}
      }
    },
    "contentDensities": {
      "compact": true,
      "cozy": true
    },
    "models": {
      "i18n": {
        "type": "sap.ui.model.resource.ResourceModel",
        "settings": {
          "bundleName": "project125.i18n.i18n"
        }
      },
      "": {
        "dataSource": "mainService",
        "preload": true,
        "settings": {
          "operationMode": "Server",
          "autoExpandSelect": true,
          "earlyRequests": true
        }
      }
    },
    "resources": {
      "css": [
        {
          "uri": "css/style.css"
        }
      ]
    },
    "routing": {
      "config": {
        "routerClass": "sap.m.routing.Router",
        "viewType": "XML",
        "async": true,
        "viewPath": "project125.view",
        "controlAggregation": "pages",
        "controlId": "app",
        "clearControlAggregation": false
      },
      "routes": [
        {
          "name": "RouteView1",
          "pattern": ":?query:",
          "target": [
            "TargetView1"
          ]
        }
      ],
      "targets": {
        "TargetView1": {
          "viewType": "XML",
          "transition": "slide",
          "clearControlAggregation": false,
          "viewId": "View1",
          "viewName": "View1"
        }
      }
    },
    "rootView": {
      "viewName": "project125.view.App",
      "type": "XML",
      "async": true,
      "id": "App"
    }
  }
}

entry.title: Re: AdobeForms. Print positions of VL02N in different pages.
entry.content:
Dear Ryan-Crosby,

That’s exactly what I’ve been experimenting with while building a custom form. I created a subform with "repeat item for each data item," and the "Item details," "header," and "data" subforms inherit this characteristic. However, the output is still only on one page instead of three separate pages.

 

Apologies for some layout text in Italian, my friend.

Thanks,
Gianluca.

entry.title: Material demand migration for project
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I need to migrate a significant number of material demands for projects (where the material demand is created for a network activity within the project structure). Couldn't find a standard way to do it. Is there any standard transaction or fiori app to perform this task?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: how to analyze the content of field format tag column in routing operations longtext
entry.content:
Hello all, 

i could need some ideas and thoughts on my challenge: 

I want to know if there are any second long text rows in an operation long text that have format tag (TXPARGRAPH)   😕   which is command

see attached screen shot (the value is "/" there, i want to find ":/" in secon row.

There shouldnt be any in our system, but I want to make sure. 

Is there any idea how i could analyze this? 

Your help is much appreciated, 

regards michael
